summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gemini streaming implementation. All 16 code structure requirements verified and integration tests passed. The refactoring successfully replaced fake chunked streaming with native Gemini streamGenerateContent API.
passed_tests: lib/gemini-stream.ts exists and exports buildGeminiRequest and streamGeminiResponse functions
buildGeminiRequest constructs proper Gemini REST body with system_instruction, contents, generationConfig, and google_search tool
streamGeminiResponse uses x-goog-api-key header (NOT ?key= URL param for API key)
streamGeminiResponse calls streamGenerateContent?alt=sse endpoint and returns ReadableStream<string>
app/api/chat/route.ts has NO fake chunking logic, uses buildGeminiRequest + streamGeminiResponse instead
route.ts sets correct headers: Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, X-Accel-Buffering: no
route.ts has export const runtime = 'edge'
route.ts wraps stream in try/catch returning 500 JSON on error before stream starts
hooks/useVoiceStateMachine.ts exposes streamingText from the hook return
Hook updates streamingText state on each SSE chunk during streaming
Hook clears streamingText on stream completion and on errors
Hook uses STREAM_CHAT_TIMEOUT (60s) instead of CHAT_TIMEOUT (10s)
Chat page displays streamingText with blinking cursor during thinking state
Blink keyframe animation is defined in the page styles
streaming-text-display and streaming-cursor have data-testid attributes
SSE parsing in gemini-stream.ts handles multiple parts per candidate
buildGeminiRequest function logic works correctly with proper structure
SSE parsing handles multiple test cases including edge cases
Streaming text state management works with incremental updates and clearing
Timeout configuration is correct with STREAM_CHAT_TIMEOUT=60000ms
action_item_for_main_agent: Implementation is complete and working correctly. The app requires CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY and GEMINI_API_KEY environment variables to run fully, but all code structure and logic is properly implemented.
